## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in on Augment Code's content sprint progress and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Published guides are already showing positive results in AI-generated search results](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Aggressive content publishing strategy agreed upon (20+ articles/week) with minimal pre-publication review](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Newsletter launch imminent, awaiting final UTM parameters](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [SEO and backlink strategy to be developed, with potential for significant investment](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Success

  - [Four guides published recently](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - Augment mentioned as \#1 in AI-generated search for "best AI coding for enterprise teams"
  - [586 custom prompts being monitored for Augment across various topics](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Goal: Publish 20+ articles per week, focusing on volume and timeliness](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

### MCP Servers and Website Updates

  - [MCP servers now live on the website](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Plan to add 200 most popular servers (by GitHub stars) initially, then 100/week](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Future improvements: sorting by popularity, one-click install feature](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### Newsletter Launch

  - [22,000 most engaged emails loaded onto platform](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Launch set for 5 AM tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [UTM parameters needed for tracking (provided by Sylvain)](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Initial focus on metrics: unsubscribe rate, open rate, click-through rate](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

### SEO and Traffic Goals

  - [Aiming for hundreds of clicks per month by end of August](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [September goal: few thousand clicks per month](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Exploring $100K investment in backlinks over next two months](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

### Content Production Tracking

  - [New dashboard tracking weekly progress on editorial and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Includes newsletter metrics (open rates, click rates, subscriber growth)](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Future phases to include quality metrics (time on page, bounce rates) and conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch newsletter at 5 AM tomorrow with provided UTM parameters](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

  - [Add 200 most popular MCP servers to website](https://fathom.video/share/xJqAvGhkLyXPMkW2TisEeoQGNyufPJaR?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
